compressed_prompt: Write a rap about a new smartphone. At the end of your response add a postscript starting with P.P.S The response must contain at least 6 placeholders represented by square brackets.
response:
(Verse 1)
Yo, check the new tech, it's a pocket-sized flex,
Droppin' the future straight to your fingertips, what's next?
A slab of pure glass, a bezel-less dream,
Brighter than sunlight, that **[AMOLED SCREAM]**.
It's got the power, a **[MULTI-CORE BEAST]**,
Runs every app in the East and the West, to say the least.
Charges in minutes, thanks to **[SUPER-CHARGE PRO]**,
While you're sippin' your drink at the **[LOCAL BIERGRO]**.

(Chorus)
This ain't just a phone, it's a **[REVOLUTION, YO]**,
Capture the stars with the **[NIGHT MODE GLOW]**.
Unlock with a glance, it just knows who you are,
A cinematic vision, straight from the **[NEURAL CORE]**.
So drop that old brick, it's a brand new day,
The ultimate device is here, and it's here to stay!

(Verse 2)
The camera's a wizard, with lenses that think,
From **[MAJESTIC MOUNTAINS]** to the kitchen sink.
It edits your life, makes your stories pop,
The competition's now officially gonna stop.
It's waterproof deep in the **[CRYSTAL BLUE BAY]**,
Streamin' your content in 8K all day.
A personal assistant, smarter and keen,
Makes all of your old tech look downright obscene.

(Chorus)
This ain't just a phone, it's a **[REVOLUTION, YO]**,
Capture the stars with the **[NIGHT MODE GLOW]**.
Unlock with a glance, it just knows who you are,
A cinematic vision, straight from the **[NEURAL CORE]**.
So drop that old brick, it's a brand new day,
The ultimate device is here, and it's here to stay!

(Outro)
Yeah... the king of the hill, the top of the game,
Forever changed, and it's etched in the name.
The **[ULTIMATE EDITION]**, no need to pretend,
This is the beginning, this is the end.

P.P.S. The launch event will be held at **[THE SILICON VISTA ARENA]** with special performance by **[CELESTIAL SOUNDS COLLECTIVE]**. Pre-orders for the **[FOUNDERS EDITION BUNDLE]** begin at **[PRECISE LAUNCH TIME]** on **[GLOBAL PRE-ORDER DATE]**. The first **[LIMITED QUANTITY]** units will include a holographic **[ARTIST SERIES CASE]**.
